title: Data Size Converter
seoDescription: Free online data size converter. Convert between Bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB, and PB instantly. Perfect for developers, IT professionals, and students.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Data Size Converter
step1Desc: Type the value you want to convert.
step2Desc: Choose the source unit and target unit from the dropdowns.
step3Desc: The converted value appears instantly. Click any result to copy.
faq1A: This tool uses binary units (1KB=1024B). Select SI mode for 1KB=1000B if needed.
faq2Q: How many MB in a GB?
faq2A: In binary: 1GB = 1024MB. In SI: 1GB = 1000MB. Use the converter to verify.
faq3A: Yes! Enter any decimal number like 1.5GB to see the equivalent in smaller units.
